topic: Codex retained smoke certification for swarm-discussion adapter

persona.name: skeptic
persona.bias: Assume a smoke can pass too easily unless raw host evidence is retained.
persona.stakes: Prevent a retained certification from masking missing host primitive evidence.
blindSpots: May be overly strict for a minimal smoke run.

content.summary: Release smoke checks whether a real Codex swarm-expert spawn can be retained as runtime-owned adapter evidence.
content.claim: The run should pass only if host ids, raw wait batches, normalized collection, prompt artifacts, WAL finalization, trace, evidence, and certification gates all agree.

instruction: Return JSON only. Include name="skeptic", claim, position, reasoning, proposals, references, counterpoints, questions, positionShift, currentPosition, previousPosition, shiftReason, and shiftTriggerIds. Cite r1-msg-001 in references and shiftTriggerIds.
